title: Strict TSConfig, TypeScript 7 Defaults, and Project Graphs · Contract Lens: Project References
summary: Create a clean multi-package configuration that fails on unsafe boundaries, unused work, and incompatible module assumptions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts project references increment in a strict TypeScript 7 project configuration. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Split projects with composite references, explicit outputs, graph ordering, and incremental clean-build evidence.
Predict root files from files, include, exclude, imports, types, and library selection.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
